Package io.forja.components.overlays.fxPopover

Class FxPopover

java.lang.Object
io.forja.components.overlays.fxPopover.FxPopover
public class FxPopover extends Object
A floating panel anchored to a target Node.

FxPopover wraps a Popup sized to arbitrary content and positioned on any Side of its anchor. Auto-hides on outside click by default.

Builder usage:

     
      FxPopover pop = FxPopover.builder()
          .anchor(button)
          .content(menuBox)
          .side(Side.BOTTOM)
          .build();
      pop.show();
See Also:
